titleStmt.title: SII 22.245: original edition by G.V. Srinivasa Rao
No. 245. (A.R. No. 245 of 1906) NORTH ARCOT DISTRICT, CHEYYAR TALUK, TIRUPPANAṄGĀḌU. ŚIVA TEMPLE—ON THE SAME WALL. TRIBH. RAJARĀJADĒVA (III)—18th YEAR (A.D. 1233-34)

summary.p: This records a gift of 32 cows for a perpetual lamp in the temple of Tiruppanaṅgāḍuḍaiyār by Ṉīṟaṇindāṉ alias Śēdirāyaṉ, a resident of Uṟandaiyūr (near Paṉaṁguḍi ?) in Rājarāja-vaḷanāḍu, a division of Śōḻamaṇḍalam, who is called a kaṉmi (agent ?) of Śambugarāyar.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svasti śrī . tribhuvanaccakravattikaḷ śrīrājarājadevaṟku yāṇṭu pati ṉeṭṭāvatu jayaṅkoṇṭa coḻamaṇṭalattu
kkāliyūr koṭṭattuk kaḻumalaṉāṭṭu Āḷuṭaiyār tiruppaṉaṅkāṭu Uṭai yāṟku campukarāyar kaṉmika
ḷil coḻamaṇṭalattu rājarāja vaḷanāṭṭup paṉaṅkuṭi yuṟantaiyūruṭaiyān ṉiṟaṇin=tānāṉa
cetirāyaṉ vaitta tiruṉun=tāviḷakku Oṉṟu Ittiruṉun=tāviḷakku Oṉṟukkum viṭṭa pacu 3 10 2 muppa
ttu Iraṇṭum Ikkoyilil kāṇiyuṭaiya śivabrāhmaṇarom kaikkoṇṭu candrādityavarai
nityamoru tiruṉun=tāviḷakku muṭṭāme Erikkakkaṭavomāka ssamatit tom Ikkoyilil kāṇiyuṭai
ya śivabrāhmaṇarom Itu paṉmāheśvara rakṣai
Digital edition of SII 22.245 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
